subcodes.first_line: Blessed be they who have detached themselves from all save Him and have attained unto that which was ordained for them in the Book inscribed by His Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله عمل الذین انقطعوا عما سواه و فازوا بما امروا به فی کتاب رقم من قلمه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
